description_long: This is a large, modern house complex with a flat roof and a geometric, modular layout. The structure is surrounded by a rectangular plot of green lawn and a perimeter fence, with a driveway leading to a detached garage at the front. The house features multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, large glass windows, and open courtyards, creating a sense of openness and integration with the outdoor space. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and black surfaces, with some beige or tan roofing elements. Landscaping includes trimmed hedges, trees, and a central pool or water feature in the courtyard. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with modular volumes, extensive glass windows, and a central courtyard, surrounded by a green lawn and perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, detached garage, main entrance, and central courtyard with a pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white and beige exterior walls, flat roofs, and the perimeter fence with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and the open courtyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black exterior sections, side garden, and the garage with lined trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide driveway, detached garage, and a prominent front door flanked by landscaping and a paved approach.
